news_items.headline: Yankees star Judge out with stress fracture in rib...
news_items.summary: Yankees outfielder Aaron Judge has been diagnosed with a stress fracture of the first rib on his right side, the team announced Thursday night.

news_items.headline: Cubs not focused on trade deadline, Hoyer says
news_items.summary: Cubs president of baseball operations Jed Hoyer called the trade deadline "the furthest thing from my mind," while also acknowledging the organization's needs if the Cubs are in the race at that time.

news_items.headline: Rangers activate SS Seager, OF Langford off IL
news_items.summary: The Rangers have activated SS Corey Seager (back) and OF Wyatt Langford (forearm) from the injured list ahead of Friday's series opener against the Guardians.

news_items.headline: Muncy, Vargas injured on violent collision at firs...
news_items.summary: Arizona Diamondbacks first baseman Ildemaro Vargas and Los Angeles Dodgers third baseman Max Muncy both left Thursday's game following a violent collision at first base.

news_items.headline: Reports: Red Sox sending shaky Bello to Triple A
news_items.summary: The Red Sox reportedly are optioning Brayan Bello to Triple-A Worcester, making the move after the right-hander struggled in yet another start Thursday against the Baltimore Orioles.

news_items.headline: Twins' Ober blames elbow woes on slick baseballs
news_items.summary: Twins right-hander Bailey Ober said he believes an elbow injury that currently has him on the 15-day injured list is the result of the baseballs used in his May 24 start against the Red Sox in Boston.

news_items.headline: Machado vents as Padres' scoring woes persist
news_items.summary: As the losses continue to mount, Padres star Manny Machado admits to being frustrated as the offense just can't seem to put any runs on the board.

news_items.headline: Astros Jose Altuve Activated from IL, Dezenzo Optioned
news_items.summary: The Astros have reinstated 2B Jose Altuve from the 10-day IL. The club optioned OF Zach Dezenzo to Triple A after last night’s game. Altuve, 36, was initially diagnosed with a Grade 2 oblique strain, but recovered faster than expected. Altuve last played May 16, missing almost 3 weeks with an injury that was expected to sideline him 4-6 […]

news_items.headline: Tigers' Cy Young winner Tarik Skubal will make rehab start Sunday, 4 weeks since new procedure to repair elbow
news_items.summary: The reigning two-time Cy Young winner is on track to potentially return to the Tigers next week amid trade rumors.

news_items.headline: Aaron Judge injury update: Latest on Yankees star and who will replace him
news_items.summary: Two-time reigning AL MVP Aaron Judge won't be re-evaluated until July at the earliest. Here's a look at the latest roster moves by the Yankees.

news_items.headline: Yankees Mailbag: Trade chips and surprise contenders
news_items.summary: The mailbag is introspective on the Yankees’ war chest ahead of what could be a busy deadline season this year.

news_items.headline: Cincinnati Reds vs. St. Louis Cardinals – Brady Singer vs. Kyle Leahy
news_items.summary: Can Brady Singer turn it around?

news_items.headline: Red Sox vs Yankees Prediction, Picks & Best Bets for Tonight's MLB Game
news_items.summary: Even without Aaron Judge, our Red Sox vs. Yankees predictions expect New York's lineup to do some serious damage against Sonny Gray.

news_items.headline: Michael Harris and Mauricio Dubón swap spots in lineup as Braves face Pirates
news_items.summary: The rest of the lineup is the same as last night as the Braves look to claim game one

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani is pitching historically well, Aaron Judge will be out for a while & Padres in a bad slump
news_items.summary: On this episode of Baseball Bar-B-Cast, Jake and Jordan look at Shohei Ohtani's recent dominant stretch on the mound, how the Yankees will handle Aaron Judge being out for a while and why the Padres are stuck in a deep funk.
